content.text:
```mdl
@ NON‑NEGOTIABLE CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON‑DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (Transportation Challenge 2017)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_9_nda_16

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Definition of the vendor party (the receiving party)
type Vendor = {
    -- Has the vendor returned the confidential information after termination?
    has_returned_confidential_info: bool,
    -- Has the vendor destroyed the confidential information after termination?
    has_destroyed_confidential_info: bool,
    -- Has the agreement been terminated?
    termination_occurred: bool
}

@ Definition of the BPS party (the disclosing party)
type BPS = {
    -- No specific fields required for this hypothesis
    dummy: unit
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The two contractual parties
entity vendor: Vendor
entity bps: BPS

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 6 – “Return or Destruction of Materials” (termination obligation)
rule O vendor_must_return_or_destroy_confidential_info_on_termination:
    vendor.termination_occurred implies
        (vendor.has_returned_confidential_info or vendor.has_destroyed_confidential_info) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Optional helper functions (none needed for this simple rule)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
